params.name: Galton Board
params.description:
On Jun 21, 1884 AD, the world's first Galton board was created, marking a historic achievement in the statistical experiment.
The Galton Board was invented by British scientist Galton. It consists of a wooden plank with iron nails evenly distributed on it, a vertical groove of equal width at the bottom, and a funnel-shaped entrance at the top. When throwing a small amount of balls into the entrance, the number of balls in each groove at the bottom will be randomly distributed; after putting i …
